channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Fire at Central California power plant prompts evacuations, shut down of Highway 1
item.description: The Moss County Sheriff's Office issued emergency evacuation orders due to a fire at the Vistra power plant in areas of Moss Landing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mud, debris slide splits hillside home that survived Palisades Fire in half
item.description: A hillside home overlooking the Pacific Ocean that survived the devastating Palisades Fire has split in half from a landslide directly behind the property.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: Fires scorched campuses across Los Angeles. Many schools are seeking places to hold classes
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Days after losing her home in the same fire that destroyed her Los Angeles elementary school, third-grader Gabriela Chevez-Muñoz resumed classes this week at another campus temporarily hosting children from her school.
item.dc:creator: KRYSTA FAURIA, JOCELYN GECKER and CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ash and other dangers mean LA area residents who fled fires a week ago won't be going home soon
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It has been more than a week since two massive fires forced tens of thousands of people to flee their homes in the Los Angeles area, and officials said Thursday residents won't be going home soon.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: As Biden warns of an 'oligarchy,' Trump will be flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: President Joe Biden's pointed warning about the U.S. becoming an “ oligarchy ” of tech billionaires will be illustrated at Donald Trump's inauguration, when the world's three richest men will sit on the dais as Trump is sworn in for a second term.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Where are they? Help sought finding those missing after Eaton Fire in California
item.description: Authorities are asking the public for help in their search for several Altadena residents who remain unaccounted for after the deadly Eaton Fire burned thousands of homes.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: Police chase suspects on bikes in Los Angeles area
item.description: Police chased two suspects in the Los Angeles area as they fled on motor bikes, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: American accused of assaulting a Pennsylvania student is extradited from France to the US
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — An American accused of sexually assaulting a Pennsylvania college student in 2013 and later sending her a Facebook message that said “So I raped you” was extradited Thursday from France to the United States. Ian Cleary, 31, of Saratoga, California, arrived in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: NICOLAS VAUX-MONTAGNY, SYLVIE CORBET and MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: PHOTOS: 'Home Alone' house in Illinois sells for $250K over asking price
item.description: A famous house featured in the iconic holiday film "Home Alone" sold this week for nearly $300,000 over its asking price.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, KRON4

item.title: Biden admin announces last round of student debt relief
item.description: The Biden administration announced its final round of student debt relief on Thursday, topping off the most loan forgiveness ever given in a presidency.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SpaceX catches its Starship rocket back at the launch pad, but the spacecraft is destroyed
item.description: Video courtesy of SpaceX. BOCA CHICA, Texas (ValleyCentral) — SpaceX launched its Starship rocket on its latest test flight Thursday, catching the booster back at the pad but losing contact with the ascending spacecraft as engines went out.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra Yañez, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Longer prison terms for human smugglers sought by US Justice Department
item.description: "We're trying to get the leaders of these smuggling groups to get longer sentences or those who work with cartels in Mexico to conduct their smuggling.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, WGN 9

item.title: College students charged in TikTok-inspired 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: WORCESTER, Mass. (AP) — Five Massachusetts college students appeared in court Thursday, accused of plotting to lure a man to their campus through a dating app and then seizing him as part of a “Catch a Predator” trend on TikTok.
item.dc:creator: KATHY McCORMACK and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump taps Voight, Gibson and Stallone as 'special envoys' to Hollywood
item.description: "These three very talented people will be my eyes and ears, and I will get done what they suggest. It will again be, like The United States of America itself, The Golden Age of Hollywood!" Trump posted.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: David Lynch, director of 'Twin Peaks,' 'Blue Velvet' and more, dies at 78, family says
item.description: David Lynch, the filmmaker and director behind such movies as “Eraserhead,” “Blue Velvet” and the TV series “Twin Peaks,” has died, his family announced in a message posted to his official Facebook page.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: From LA wildfires to hurricanes, immigrants help rebuild after disasters. Some may face deportation
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — While firefighters battled blazes in the Los Angeles area this week, Alejandro, a 55-year-old from Mexico, was one of several day laborers leading cleanups near scorched neighborhoods in Pasadena and Altadena.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok CEO attending Trump inauguration
item.description: TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew will attend President-elect Donald Trump's inauguration next week, one day after a potential ban of the video-sharing platform could take effect in the U.S., according to a source familiar with the plans.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, Fox 5

item.title: Meet the Americans who still take COVID-19 precautions seriously
item.description: Susan Scarbro stares down a bowling lane at the distant pins. She hears a sound that breaks her focus. Was that a cough? Will her mask protect her? COVID-19 remains a very present threat for the 55-year-old. Scarbro has multiple immune disorders, making her vulnerable to infection.
item.dc:creator: DEVNA BOSE and CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Louisiana governor relocating homeless people ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Louisiana authorities are clearing homeless encampments around the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans ahead of next month's Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Los Angeles wildfires: Armed homeowners patrol for looters inside evacuation zone
item.description: Los Angeles' wildfires have homeowners in Altadena patrolling their own streets to ward off looters, even amid evacuation orders and fiery conditions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Palisades Fire firefighters taking part in first-of-its-kind cancer study
item.description: The Wildfire Conservancy is conducting a first-of-a-kind cancer study on firefighters battling the Palisades Fire.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KRON4

item.title: Oklahoma Governor Stitt wants state militia reinstated
item.description: The governor wants to create a militia that would operate independently from the Oklahoma National Guard.
item.dc:creator: Amaya Ward / KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: 2025 Grammys to proceed with focus on wildfire relief. Here's what you can expect
item.description: The 2025 Grammy Awards are right around the corner, which means it is time to get those viewing party plans in action. Allow us to help.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Eager visitors flock to see spectacular lava fountaining from Kilauea eruption in Hawaii
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — People were flocking to Hawaii Volcanoes National Park on Wednesday to get a glimpse of fountaining lava. The eruption that began Dec. 23 in a crater at the summit of Kilauea volcano has paused periodically.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden warns of dangers of 'oligarchy' of ultra-rich, 'tech-industrial complex' running country
item.description: President Joe Biden will deliver his farewell address to the nation on Wednesday, days before President-elect Donald Trump returns to the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: NY federal judge denies bail for two real estate brokers and their brother in sex trafficking case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two luxury real estate brokers and their brother accused of raping dozens of women over two decades will remain in jail to await their trial on sex trafficking charges, a federal judge in New York City ruled Wednesday. Judge Valerie E.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Whoopi Goldberg backs Carrie Underwood inauguration performance
item.description: The comments about Underwood’s inauguration performance are notable coming from Goldberg, who is commonly a harsh critic of Trump.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KTLA 5

item.title: Montana House endorses transgender bathroom ban affecting fellow lawmakers
item.description: Montana’s Republican-controlled House on Wednesday endorsed a ban on transgender people using bathrooms in public buildings that do not align with their sex assigned at birth — a change that would complicate daily life for two fellow lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fire tornadoes pose a threat in California. A fire lab shows how they work
item.description: As if they aren’t already facing enough, firefighters in California also could encounter fire tornadoes — a rare but dangerous phenomenon in which wildfires create their own weather.
item.dc:creator: HOLLY RAMER and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pennsylvania grandfather in legal battle over backyard coaster
item.description: Some people build swing sets for their grandkids but Michael Chorba of Columbia County, Pennsylvania, has taken that a step further. He's refurbished an old rollercoaster on his property.
item.dc:creator: Amelia Sack, KRON4

item.title: Southwest pilot arrested for suspected DUI at Georgia airport
item.description: A Southwest flight was delayed for five hours Wednesday morning due to a pilot being arrested and charged with DUI, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Natasha Young, KRON4

item.title: US government sues Southwest Airlines, fines Frontier for chronically delayed flights
item.description: “Airlines have a legal obligation to ensure that their flight schedules provide travelers with realistic departure and arrival times," Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Disabled Los Angeles fire victim escaped flames in wheelchair
item.description: Galen Buckwalter, who is paralyzed from the waist down, said he watched as the glow of the wildfire raced down the San Gabriel Mountains toward their home in the foothill community of Sierra Madre.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Actor Bill Hader 'in shock' returning to Palisades Fire neighborhood
item.description: "It's just gone. Everything," "Barry" actor Bill Hader said as he returned to the Pacific Palisades area.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WGN 9

item.title: Flags ordered to fly at full-staff on Inauguration Day in multiple states
item.description: GOP governors of at least eight states ordered flags to be flown at full-staff on Inauguration Day, bucking tradition by raising flags before the end of a customary 30-day mourning period following the death of former President Jimmy Carter.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, KRON4

item.title: Michelle Obama to skip Trump inauguration
item.description: Former first lady Michelle Obama is skipping President-elect Trump's inauguration next week, after raising eyebrows by not attending former President Jimmy Carter's funeral in Washington, D.C., last week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5
